summary: Agave: slow-grown, desert-minded storefront. Products crafted without shortcuts, built to outlast the moment you bought them for.
notes: First self-healing-loop rehearsal cleared 5 watcher-summary blockers in 1 attempt. Full `bin/check.py --all` surface still fails on cross-theme product-photo / hero-placeholder uniqueness (30 + 24 byte-identical files with obel/basalt), faq-accordion microcopy copy-paste from obel, hover-contrast on .single_add_to_cart_button:hover, and 4 new a11y-color-contrast snap errors. Promotion gated on those clearing via a broader agentic round that feeds `bin/check.py --all --offline` output into the unblocker.
